Options: A. Mama Coco starts singing along and remembers her father
B. The family stops Miguel from singing
Hints: Hint1: “Music can bring back memories that were never truly lost.”
Hint2: “A forgotten name begins to return through a familiar song.”

Options: A. The balloons burst and the house crashes
B. Carl throws furniture out of the house to make it lighter
C. Kevin flies away with the balloons

Hints: Hint1: “Carl realizes he must let go of the past to move forward.”

Options: A. The town decides to make Lightning McQueen the new mayor
B. Lightning McQueen immediately leaves Radiator Springs to reach California
C. The townspeople celebrate and decide to help him get back to the race
D. The sheriff arrests Lightning McQueen again
Hints: Hint1: “Sometimes, helping others makes them want to help you in return.”
Hint2: “His actions change how the town sees him overnight.”
